sql_array: CREATE TABLE employee (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name CLOB, department CLOB);
INSERT INTO employee (id, name, department) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 'HR');
INSERT INTO employee (id, name, department) VALUES (2, 'Bob', 'Engineering');
UPDATE employee SET department = 'Marketing' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT sys.group_concat(name) FROM employee GROUP BY department;
